Text: The core of @claudeai code is a while(true) loop. Everything else is harness.

12 layers: loop, tools, planning, sub-agents, knowledge injection, compression, tasks, teams, protocols, autonomous mode, worktree isolation.

The innovation isn't any one layer. It's the composition. https://t.co/KxYX8qa9rA https://t.co/1MyxgcLFE3
